feed.title: Howl Street — Your Wolf of Wall Street
feed.subtitle: They howl for themselves. We howl for you. No-BS finance signals from 100+ sources.

entry.title: [LOUDEST HOWL] Iran warns of subsea cable threats in Strait of Hormuz amid tensions #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Iran's focus on subsea cables highlights digital vulnerabilities, potentially impacting global trade and insurance beyond oil transit. The post Iran warns of subsea cable threats in Strait of Hormuz amid tensions appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Fitch switches outlook on Landbank, DBP to ‘negative’ #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: MANILA, Philippines — Fitch Ratings has revised the outlooks on the country’s two state-owned lenders to “negative,” following a similar sovereign credit outlook downgrade last week. This signaled pressure on the government’s ability and willingness to support the banks. In a commentary on Tuesday, the London-based debt watchdog said the government support ratings (GSR) of

entry.title: UK MPs reject probe into Mandelson claims, shoring up Starmer’s position #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The vote temporarily stabilizes Starmer's leadership but leaves unresolved tensions that could impact Labour's future dynamics and strategy. The post UK MPs reject probe into Mandelson claims, shoring up Starmer’s position appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Lincoln Investment Appoints Anthony Bueti as Chief Operating Officer to Scale Enterprise Operations for Wealth Management Firm #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: The appointment of Anthony Bueti furthers a strategic leadership restructuring aimed at enhancing advisor experience and operational efficiency for the $60B wealth management firm. FORT WASHINGTON, Pa., April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Lincoln Investment Planning, LLC (Lincoln Investment),...

entry.title: Tombot’s Robotic Companion Jennie Makes Film Debut in “Walkies,” A Story of Healing & Connection #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Director Roe Moore’s Short Film World Premiered at the Pasadena International Film Festival SANTA CLARITA, Calif. — After earning widespread recognition and major media acclaim over the past two years for its groundbreaking product emergence, Tombot’s Jennie robotic canine companion now makes its debut on the silver screen in Walkies, the new short film directed […]

entry.title: ECB raises 2026 inflation forecast amid energy price surge #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Rising inflation forecasts due to energy costs may limit ECB's ability to cut rates, impacting economic growth and financial stability. The post ECB raises 2026 inflation forecast amid energy price surge appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Rumen Radev’s Progressive Bulgaria wins parliamentary majority #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: Radev's majority win could stabilize Bulgaria's politics, enabling significant reforms, but coalition dynamics may pose future challenges. The post Rumen Radev’s Progressive Bulgaria wins parliamentary majority appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: TON launches Agentic Wallets to let AI agents transact onchain through Telegram #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: TON Tech launched Agentic Wallets, letting AI agents manage dedicated TON wallets and transact onchain through Telegram. The post TON launches Agentic Wallets to let AI agents transact onchain through Telegram appeared first on Crypto Briefing .

entry.title: Trump meets security officials as Iran diplomacy stalls #HowlStreet #Markets

entry.title: The 2027 Social Security COLA Forecast: Why Q1 Inflation Data Points to a Disappointing Raise #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: There’s a reason lawmakers voted years ago to make Social Security’s cost-of-living adjustments, or COLAs, automatic. Without those yearly increases, Social Security benefits would be guaranteed to lose buying power over time. Now, Social Security COLAs are tied to the Consumer Price Index for Urban Wage Earners and Clerical Workers, or CPI-W. When there’s an ... The 2027 Social Security COLA Forecast: Why Q1 Inflation Data Points to a Disappointing Raise

entry.title: Tetragon Financial Group Limited Announcement of Dividend #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: LONDON, April 28, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Dividend Announcement: On 28 April 2026, the Board of Directors of Tetragon declared a dividend of U.S.$0.12 (12.00 cents) per share in respect of the first quarter of 2026. The ex-dividend date is 30 April 2026. The record date is 4 May 2026....

entry.title: Ex-dividend date and procedure for the payment of Pieno Žvaigždės AB dividends for the year 2025 #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: On 28 April 2026, the Annual General Meeting of Shareholders of Pieno Žvaigždės AB decided to allocate the Company’s profit for the year 2025 and to pay out EUR 0.14 dividend per share.

entry.title: 2025 m. AB Pieno Žvaigždės dividendų ex-diena ir mokėjimo tvarka #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: 2026 m. balandžio 28 d. įvykęs eilinis visuotinis AB „Pieno Žvaigždės“ akcininkų susirinkimas nusprendė paskirstyti 2025 m. Bendrovės pelną ir skirti 0,14 euro dividendų vienai akcijai.

entry.title: Your job can actually kill you: More than 840,000 people die annually from health conditions linked to work stress, ILO report says #HowlStreet #Markets
entry.summary: A new ILO report says long hours, job insecurity, bullying, and other psychosocial risks at work are tied to a total 1.37% loss of the global GDP.
